'''âw-d-v-f''' ('''kawadvefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fordote|fordote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fordote|fordote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-d-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| kawadvefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadvefoko|thiwadvefoko]] || [[word:jiwadvefoko|jiwadvefoko]] || [[word:shiwadvefoko|shiwadvefoko]] || [[word:kiwadvefoko|kiwadvefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadvefoko|thuthuwadvefoko]] || [[word:jujuwadvefoko|jujuwadvefoko]] || [[word:shushuwadvefoko|shushuwadvefoko]] || [[word:kukuwadvefoko|kukuwadvefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowadvefoko|thowadvefoko]] || [[word:jowadvefoko|jowadvefoko]] || [[word:showadvefoko|showadvefoko]] || [[word:kowadvefoko|kowadvefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwadvefoko|thĂŠwadvefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠwadvefoko|jĂŠwadvefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠwadvefoko|shĂŠwadvefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠwadvefoko|kĂŠwadvefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
